item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Reminding all students who signed up for Varsity Track and Field - our 1st practice takes place today afterschool. Please make sure your signed participation form is submitted to Mrs. Longval before practice begins. Please meet Mr. and Mrs. Longval in the atrium.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: There will be a Unity Club meeting tomorrow at lunch for any students wishing to help with events for Asian Heritage Month and Pride Month. We need people on stage AND behind the scenes, so everyone is welcome! Please come to room 127 tomorrow at lunch time if you're interested in helping or just learning more.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: All ski/snowboarders are asked to return their arm band to Mme Bourdon as soon as possible.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: A big thank you to everyone who helped lead the Holy Week prayer service last week! Thank you to students for your reading of the Passion Narrative. Also a big thank you to our music ministry; your dedication and talents gave so much beauty to our celebration. Thank you also to our cross bearers, and to our light and sound team and ushers for all of your work. Thank you all for your time and dedication, and for stepping out in faith to witness to Goodness of God.

item.title: A message from: Ms. Brennan.
item.description: Attention Garden Club! We will be transplanting seedlings this Thursday after school. Check our Teams page for photos and updates!
